data.title: Trump Administration To Lay Off Nearly 90% Of CFPB Employees In Major Downsizing: Report
data.description: The Trump administration is cutting nearly 90% of CFPB's staff and shifting focus from consumer financial protection to fraud.

data.title: Cathie Wood Says She's Trusting Trump Will Get Call On Tariffs Right: 'Investors Shorting The Equity Market Now Will Be Caught Flat Footed Or Worse'
data.description: American investor Cathie Wood hinted at her support for President Donald Trump's trade and economic playbook by sharing an insightful article on the destructive impact of tariffs, written by renowned supply-side economist and creator of the "Laffer Curve" Dr. Arthur B. Laffer.

data.title: TSMC Confident Amid Trump Tariff Turmoil: CEO CC Wei Says No Change In Customer Behavior Despite Nvidia H20 Chip Curbs
data.description: TSMC remains confident in its business outlook, with CEO C.C. Wei reporting no change in customer behavior despite ongoing geopolitical risks, including Nvidia's H20 chip clampdown and tariff uncertainties.

data.title: Trump Admin Exempts US Exporters From China-Built Ship Fees Amid Industry Pushback
data.description: Trump exempts domestic shippers from port fees on China-built vessels, aims to boost US shipbuilding industry and counter Chinese influence.

data.title: Isaac Newton-inspired Crypto Defies Gravity, Soars 7600% Since The Year Began
data.description: A cryptocurrency project inspired by scientific great Isaac Newton has quietly made waves this year, with its native coin's year-to-date explosion leaving reputable names far behind.
